summary: Iteration 126 testing complete: Cosmic Toolbar feature verified. All tests pass. The new unified CosmicToolbar replaces the 3 old floating widgets (VoiceCommandButton, QuickMeditateFAB, BackToTop). Toolbar correctly appears on authenticated pages (/dashboard, /starseed-adventure, /starseed-realm, /spiritual-avatar, /cosmic-mixer) and is hidden on public pages (/, /auth). Seasonal frequencies (Vernal Awakening 396.5Hz, Founder's Harmonic 432.11Hz) visible in Cosmic Mixer.
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: App.js imports VoiceCommandButton, QuickMeditateFAB, BackToTop (lines 15, 23-24) but they are no longer rendered. These unused imports should be removed for code cleanliness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cosmic Toolbar feature fully verified. The toolbar uses createPortal to document.body for z-index reliability. Meditate button is hidden on /cosmic-mixer page (separate mixer controls exist). Back-to-top button only shows after scrolling 400px.
